flags.summary: 10-year earnings at East-West University are 49% below the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($30.0k vs $58.7k).

flags.label: In-state tuition

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at East-West University rose 300% between 2021 and 2024 (4.8% → 19.2%).
